TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Eddie_Rochester_Anderson, title = Eddie_Rochester_Anderson, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Eddie_Rochester_Anderson} }

S.FORM: Eddie "Rochester" Anderson kawas tay 1905, ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 9, Eddie "Rochester" Anderson, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1977) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Eddie "Rochester" Anderson kawas tay 1905, ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 9, Eddie "Rochester" Anderson, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1977) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: e**ie "roʦ~ʨħes~ɕter" an*ers~ɕon kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, e**ie "roʦ~ʨħes~ɕter" an*ers~ɕon, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
